name: War Machine
description: You have to command a destructive weapon - a trebuchet. Find and attack weak points of fortifications. Destroy the enemy using various types of projectiles. Liberate your lands from the enemy hordes!
instructions: Use the left mouse button touchpad on desktop or touchscreen on mobile devices to activate the weapon Hints inside the game will help you get the hang of it
tags: 3D, angrybirds, Castle, Casual, crash, destruction, Mind, smash, throwing, unity, War, WebGL
